results.title: Justice chancellor: Municipal support for private kindergarten fees optional
results.description: Chancellor of Justice Ülle Madise says local governments are not required to subsidize private kindergarten attendance if a child has access to a public kindergarten.

results.title: UP Police Constable Admit Card 2026 Out: How to download hall ticket online?
results.description: The Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB) has officially issued the UP Police Constable Admit Card 2026 on June 4. Eligible candidates can access and download their respective admit cards by visiting the official website at uppbpb.gov.in.

results.title: 'Can’t work against conscience’: Ramalinga Reddy resigns from D K Shivakumar Cabinet over Bengaluru portfolio snub
results.description: Political Rifts: Discover why Ramalinga Reddy resigned from the D K Shivakumar Cabinet over a disputed Bengaluru portfolio allocation.

results.title: Lagos APC faithfuls protest alleged alteration to Eti-Osa Assembly primary election winner
results.description: The appeal followed the publication of the Lagos APC’s list of successful candidates for the House of Representatives and Lagos State House of Assembly elections, which named Saheed Bankole as the party’s candidate for Eti-Osa Constituency I. The post Lagos APC faithfuls protest alleged alteration to Eti-Osa Assembly primary election winner appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria .

results.title: Australia supports safe, secure and effective correctional services in Papua New Guinea.
results.description: Across Papua New Guinea, correctional facilities face increasing demand and ageing infrastructure. This can affect working conditions for staff and the safety and wellbeing of detainees. Australia’s Economic and Social Infrastructure Program (ESIP) is working with the Government of PNG and partners to support long-term infrastructure planning for Papua New Guinea Correctional Service.
